_meta.title: 拡散モデルを読み込む
CLIPテキストエンコード（プロンプト）

inputs.string: <s>[SYSTEM_PROMPT]你是一个专业的文生图 Prompt 增强助手。你将收到用户的简短图片描述及目标生成分辨率，请据此扩写为一段内容丰富、细节充分的视觉描述，以帮助文生图模型生成高质量的图片。仅输出增强后的描述，不要包含任何解释或前缀。[/SYSTEM_PROMPT][INST]{"prompt": "{prompt}", "width": {width}, "height": {height}}[/INST]

inputs.value:
A dark anime cinematic movie poster in 16:9 landscape format. The composition follows the rule of thirds with the character positioned at the right third.

Main figure: A fallen angel girl with dark-aqua twintails fading to black tips stands at the right side of the image, viewed from a slightly low angle looking up. She has one broken black-feathered wing on her left side, extended partially open, and a glowing teal wing scar on her right back. A cracked golden halo floats above her head, flickering between gold and purple. She wears a long tattered black angelic robe with corroded gold embroidery and faint purple circuit glow. A frozen-tear pendant glows teal at her chest. Broken golden shackles with short chains on both wrists. Her expression is one of fierce quiet determination. Her teal eyes glow. Wind blows her hair and robe strongly to the left.

Background: She stands on the edge of a massive broken marble platform floating high above an infinite dark cloud sea. Behind her and to the left, the shattered remnants of a heavenly cathedral — collapsed Corinthian pillars, floating marble debris, broken stained glass fragments catching light, scattered golden feathers drifting in the air. Far above in the dark sky, a single dramatic beam of golden divine light breaks through the clouds, creating volumetric light rays and illuminating the scene from behind the character, producing a strong silhouette rim light effect. Black feathers and golden dust particles fill the atmosphere.

Typography layout — Japanese text elements rendered in the image:

Main title text at the left side of the image, vertically written top to bottom in large bold Japanese calligraphy style: '闇堕ちの旋律' — each character approximately 100px tall, in deep purple color with a subtle gold metallic edge glow and slight shadow. The calligraphy has an elegant but aggressive brush stroke quality.

Subtitle text horizontally below the main title area in clean white sans-serif font, size medium: 'Melody of the Fallen'

Tagline text horizontally at the upper-left corner in small elegant white serif font: '翼を失くした天使が、闇の底で見つけた光——'

Credit-style text at the very bottom of the image in small gray sans-serif font, spread horizontally across the bottom edge: 'Music: 闇堕ちの旋律 / Melody of the Fallen　|　Visual Design: Dark Fantasy × Renaissance × Cyberpunk　|　Character: Fallen Seraph Miku'

A small logo-style text in the bottom-right corner: 'FALLEN SERAPH PROJECT' in thin white uppercase letters.

Style: Dark anime cinematic composition with dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, deep shadows, atmospheric volumetric light rays, and film grain texture. Muted color palette dominated by black, deep purple, antique gold, and teal accents. Professional anime movie poster quality with clean, readable Japanese typography integrated naturally into the composition.

Without blurry or misspelled text, distorted anatomy, extra fingers or limbs, bright cheerful colors, modern city background, watermarks, low quality, text overlapping the character's face.
